hero.subtitle: A personal studio for apps, ideas, and experiments.

about.label: About Moolab
about.heading:
A lab run by
one person.
about.body: Moolab is a small personal studio where curiosity turns into products. From utility apps to side experiments — built slowly, with care.
about.value1Body: Turn ideas into real products. Even small, finished things count.
about.value2Body: Try unvalidated ideas without fear. That's where discoveries happen.
about.value3Body: Shipping beats perfecting. The world teaches you what code never will.
about.ctaBody: Collaboration, feedback, or just a hello — always welcome.

snapdock.name: SnapDock
snapdock.subtitle: A dock launcher, anywhere
snapdock.description: SnapDock is a floating dock launcher for macOS. Summon it anywhere on screen with a keyboard shortcut, launch your favorite apps, and it disappears automatically.
snapdock.instantAccessBody: Press your keyboard shortcut (default: ⌃⌘Space) and SnapDock appears right at your cursor. Click an app to launch it — the dock vanishes instantly.
snapdock.organizeBody: Pin your favorite apps, drag to reorder freely, and see running apps at a glance.
snapdock.designBody: Built with Apple's Liquid Glass design system. A clean translucent interface that feels native to macOS.
snapdock.privacyBody: SnapDock collects zero data. No analytics, no tracking, no network requests.

snapdockPrivacy.title: Privacy Policy — SnapDock
snapdockPrivacy.overviewBody: SnapDock is a macOS utility that provides a floating dock launcher. Your privacy is important to us, and SnapDock is designed with privacy as a core principle.
snapdockPrivacy.dataBody: SnapDock does not collect, store, transmit, or share any personal data.
snapdockPrivacy.dataItem6: No access to your files or documents
snapdockPrivacy.accessibilityBody: SnapDock requests Accessibility permission solely to detect keyboard shortcuts. This access is used only to register and respond to your configured hotkey. No keystrokes, screen content, or user activity is recorded or monitored.
snapdockPrivacy.storageBody: SnapDock stores your preferences (pinned apps, shortcut key, layout settings) locally on your Mac using macOS UserDefaults. This data never leaves your device.
snapdockPrivacy.thirdPartyBody: SnapDock does not integrate with any third-party services, SDKs, or APIs.
snapdockPrivacy.childrenBody: SnapDock does not collect any data from anyone, including children under 13.
snapdockPrivacy.changesBody: If this policy changes, updates will be posted at this URL. Since SnapDock collects no data, significant changes are unlikely.
snapdockPrivacy.contactBody: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at:

snapdockSupport.title: Support — SnapDock
snapdockSupport.gettingHelpBody: If you're experiencing issues with SnapDock or have questions, we're here to help.
snapdockSupport.issue1Title: Dock doesn't appear when I press the shortcut
snapdockSupport.issue1Fix1: Make sure Accessibility permission is granted in System Settings > Privacy & Security > Accessibility.
snapdockSupport.issue1Fix2: Try changing the shortcut in SnapDock settings (click the menu bar icon).
snapdockSupport.issue2Fix2: Try removing and re-adding the app to SnapDock.
snapdockSupport.issue3Title: How to change the keyboard shortcut
snapdockSupport.issue3Fix1: Click the SnapDock icon in the menu bar.
snapdockSupport.issue3Fix3: Click the shortcut field and press your desired key combination.
